coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 42-node closure.
validation: Six Blender/VM cases cover the authored mesh-line length, diameter, midpoint placement, cutter mode, round-square profile, and cutter offset. Every case has exact vertex and face counts plus identical local bounds at four-decimal precision. Plane.001 is an identical saved shelf-dowel copy, while Vert.003 uses the same graph over a longer source line.
